zh.North Elmsall, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾諾斯 艾爾姆薩爾
zh.Carenty, Lincolnshire, England, United K: 英國英格蘭林可爾史爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Cecilia Tansley於1381年出生在英國諾圖波藍德時，她的父親John Tansley Earl of Combs31歲，母親Mrs. Alice Tansley Countess of Combs31歲。她於1408年與Richard Wentworth在英國越可爾諾斯 艾爾姆薩爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.Carenty, Lincolnshire, England, United K: 英国英格兰林可爾史爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cecilia Tansley于1381年出生在英国諾圖波藍德时，她的父亲John Tansley Earl of Combs31岁，母亲Mrs. Alice Tansley Countess of Combs31岁。她于1408年与Richard Wentworth在英国越可爾諾斯 艾爾姆薩爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Tansley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Midlands): habitational name from Tansley in Derbyshire, named from an Old English personal name Tān (genitive Tānes) or Old English tān ‘twig, sprout, shoot’ (genitive tānes) + lēah ‘wood, woodland clearing’.

nameMeanings.name: Cecilia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin name Caecilia, feminine form of Caecilius ( see Cecil ). This was a good deal more common than the masculine form, largely due to the fame of the 2nd- or 3rd-century virgin martyr whose name is still mentioned daily in the Roman Catholic Canon of the Mass. She is regarded as the patron saint of music and has inspired works such as Purcell's ‘Ode on St Cecilia's Day’, although the reasons for this association are not clear.

variants.name: Cecelia
meanings: From the Latin name Caecilia, feminine form of Caecilius ( see Cecil ). This was a good deal more common than the masculine form, largely due to the fame of the 2nd- or 3rd-century virgin martyr whose name is still mentioned daily in the Roman Catholic Canon of the Mass. She is regarded as the patron saint of music and has inspired works such as Purcell's ‘Ode on St Cecilia's Day’, although the reasons for this association are not clear.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Cecilia Tansley was born in 1381, in Northumberland, England, her father, John Tansley Earl of Combs, was 31 and her mother, Mrs. Alice Tansley Countess of Combs, was 31. She married Richard Wentworth in 1408, in North Elmsall, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cecilia Tansley est née en 1381, à Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, John Tansley Earl of Combs, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Alice Tansley Countess of Combs, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Wentworth en 1408, à North Elmsall, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cecilia Tansley 1381 in Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Tansley Earl of Combs 31 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Alice Tansley Countess of Combs 31. Sie hat 1408 in North Elmsall, Yorkshire, England Richard Wentworth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cecilia Tansley è nata il nel 1381 nel Northumberland, England, sua padre, John Tansley Earl of Combs, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Mrs. Alice Tansley Countess of Combs, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Richard Wentworth nel 1408, nel North Elmsall, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie.

ja.Northumberland, England: イギリスノースウンバーランド

ja.lifeSummary: Cecilia Tansleyが1381年にイギリスノースウンバーランドで生まれた時，父John Tansley Earl of Combsは31歳，母Mrs. Alice Tansley Countess of Combsは31歳であった。1408年にイギリスヨークシュアイアノース エルムサルでRichard Wentworthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Cecilia Tansley(이)가 1381년 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Tansley Earl of Combs(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Alice Tansley Countess of Combs(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1408년 영국 요르크실르 노르스 엘사에서 Richard Wentworth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cecilia Tansley nasceu em 1381, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Tansley Earl of Combs, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Alice Tansley Countess of Combs, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Wentworth em 1408, em North Elmsall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cecilia Tansley родилась в 1381 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени John Tansley Earl of Combs было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Alice Tansley Countess of Combs, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Wentworth в 1408 г. в местности норт элмсалл, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cecilia Tansley nació en 1381, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, John Tansley Earl of Combs, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Mrs. Alice Tansley Countess of Combs, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Richard Wentworth en 1408, en North Elmsall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas.
